name: Mimikatz IMP Hash Observed
notes: This rule triggers when Mimikatz IMP Hash is detected.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
when the event matches IMP Hash (custom) is any of [1B0369A1E06271833F78FFA70FFB4EAF or 214CCCFFB2136A0559FF0C2324B226BA]
TD_list: APPLY Mimikatz IMP Hash Observed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
AND when the event matches IMP Hash (custom) is any of [1B0369A1E06271833F78FFA70FFB4EAF or 214CCCFFB2136A0559FF0C2324B226BA]
RED_list: Event name: Detected Mimikatz Based on IMP Hash
Event description: Detected Mimikatz Based on IMP Hash
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
Add the "sourceIP" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "Compromised Hosts"
